original_image_tags: Grayscale infrared sensor still with a white crosshair reticle. The vertical line is solid; the horizontal line has tick marks labeled "3" on the left and right. Near the center, slightly above the horizontal line, is a dark, blob-like object with a smaller companion blob immediately to its right, resembling a dumbbell or two objects in close proximity. The background is uniform gray with visible sensor noise. Multiple black redaction bars cover the top, left, and right margins. A timestamp in the bottom-left corner reads "12/31/99 18:19:19".

elements.description: Grayscale sensor or camera capture displaying a grainy sky with a central white crosshair. Inside the crosshair is one small, dark, irregular object. The horizontal axis is marked with the number '3' at both ends. The bottom left corner displays a timestamp: '12/31/99 18:19:19'.

Multiple horizontal black redaction bars covering text. There are eight bars in total: one wide bar at the top, and three smaller bars on both the left and right sides of the image, partially obscuring the background.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content: a grayscale sensor capture with a white crosshair, a central dark object, axis marks labeled '3', a timestamp, and redaction bars; they only disagree on the count of object blobs and the number of redaction bars.
